title: First Steps Baby Bath Time Bath Tub Support Sponge in Teddy Bear Shape for Babies from Newborn Blue
features: Designed to help hold & support your newborn baby during bathing
Creates comfort, support and reassurance making bath time easier for you
Can be used in an adult bath
Suitable for babies from 0months+ Approximate measurements: 48cm x 29cm x 4.5cm
description: Product Description From First Steps comes this baby bath time support Help make bath time fun and easy Designed to help hold support your newborn baby during bathing Creates comfort, support and reassurance Convenient lightweight Teddy shape is fun for baby Can be used in an adult bath Suitable for babies from newborn Approximate measurements: 48cm x 29cm x 4.5cm Care and use instructions provided. Safety Warning Do not pour hot water directly onto the foam support, as it will retain the heat. Do not allow the water level to exceed the foam support. never leave your baby unattended in the bath even for a short time.
